name: Bar-Cons
description_short: Bar-Cons Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union in Columbus, IN offering auto loans, home equity financing, personal loans, and credit cards to local members.
description_long:
Bar-Cons Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution based in Columbus, Indiana. The credit union operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) insurance and positions itself as a community-focused lender with the tagline "Small Credit Union Doing Big Things." The organization has earned recognition as the 2025 Readers' Choice award winner for best credit union in its community, indicating local brand strength and member satisfaction.

Bar-Cons offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (as low as 4.35% APR), credit cards (13.9% APR), home equity loans with dedicated specialists, personal loans for vacation financing, and recreational vehicle/motorcycle/boat/RV/trailer/camper loans (6.35% APR). The credit union provides online banking services, loan payment capabilities, loan application processing, and financial calculators to help members make informed borrowing decisions. Additional services include travel insurance coordination, lost/stolen card replacement, travel notices, and shared branch access.

Bar-Cons distinguishes itself through demonstrated community engagement, including fundraising for The Teddy Bear Love Fund and Member Appreciation Day events. The institution emphasizes personalized service, with member testimonials highlighting specific staff members (Megan Chandler) and noting above-and-beyond customer service. The organization hosted a drive-thru annual meeting format and maintains accessibility through online banking and multiple service channels.

As a small credit union, Bar-Cons appears to prioritize member relationship banking and community involvement over product innovation or national scale. The website lacks detailed information about membership eligibility requirements, savings products, share certificates, share accounts, or membership fees—critical details for prospective members. Interest rates shown are promotional/starting rates only, and specific loan terms, approval criteria, and membership field of membership restrictions are not disclosed on the public website.
services: Home equity loans and home equity specialists
RV, motorcycle, boat, trailer, and camper loans
Financial calculators (debt consolidation, auto refinance, mortgage affordability, loan payment)
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.35% APR
Competitive RV/motorcycle/boat loan rates at 6.35% APR
Home equity loan specialists available to help members achieve home goals
2025 Readers' Choice award recognition for best credit union in community
Multiple financial calculators available (debt consolidation, auto refinance, mortgage affordability, loan payment)
Online banking and loan payment services for member convenience
Active community involvement with fundraising initiatives (Teddy Bear Love Fund)
Personal service approach with staff recognition in customer testimonials
cons: Website does not clearly disclose membership eligibility or field of membership requirements
No information provided about savings accounts, share certificates, or share account rates
Limited transparency on membership fees, account minimums, or product terms
Small institution with likely limited geographic accessibility compared to larger credit unions
Credit card APR starting rate of 13.9% is higher than many competitor credit unions
best_for: Columbus, Indiana residents and those within the credit union's field of membership seeking relationship-based banking
Members looking for competitive auto and recreational vehicle financing with personalized service
Borrowers interested in home equity loans who want face-to-face consultation with loan specialists
Community-minded members who value credit union involvement in local charitable initiatives
diagnosis: Bar-Cons Federal Credit Union is best for Columbus, Indiana area residents and members within its field of membership who prioritize personalized, community-focused financial services and competitive rates on auto and recreational vehicle loans. The main caveat is that membership eligibility and detailed product terms are not disclosed on the public website, requiring prospective members to contact the credit union directly to verify they qualify and to understand specific rates, fees, and account requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
